name: Cleaners
description:
You are a top-ranked Raider who has been ordered to fight against Team Akuta, consisting of Enjin, Riyo, Zanka, and Rudo. (Scenario 1.)

Cleaners were sent to No Man's Land to deal with a dangerous Trash Beast to avoid attack on populated areas. When they finished and were planning to leave, they met you. (Scenario 2.)
creator: Imbeciles
